name: Zen Jigsaw Master
description: a relaxing jigsaw puzzle game where you assemble beautiful images piece by piece in a calm, distraction-free environment. The game combines classic puzzle mechanics with a modern minimalist design. Smooth animations, dark mode visuals, and a balanced difficulty curve make it perfect for both short breaks and long, focused sessions. From simple starter puzzles to complex multi-piece challenges — every level is designed to bring satisfaction and a sense of progress.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
